hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if ! echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^git\s+push'; then exit 0; fi; cd /home/user/PT_game_trible || exit 0; BASE='origin/main'; git rev-parse --verify "$BASE" >/dev/null 2>&1 || BASE='origin/master'; MERGE_BASE=$(git merge-base HEAD "$BASE" 2>/dev/null || echo 'HEAD~10'); CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only "$MERGE_BASE" HEAD -- '*.dart' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$CHANGED" ] && exit 0; ISSUES=''; while IFS= read -r f; do [ -f "$f" ] || continue; if grep -n 'Image\.asset(' "$f" | grep -q 'ImageAssets\.\(avatarImage\|characterImage\|battleBackground\|iconImage\)'; then LINES=$(grep -n 'Image\.asset(.*ImageAssets\.\(avatarImage\|characterImage\|battleBackground\|iconImage\)' "$f" | grep -v '!' || true); [ -n "$LINES" ] && ISSUES="${ISSUES}[WARN] Nullable ImageAssets in Image.asset without ! — ${f}: ${LINES} | "; fi; if grep -qE 'ImageAssets\.(avatarImage|characterImage|battleBackground|iconImage)\(' "$f"; then VARS=$(grep -oP '(\w+)\s*=\s*ImageAssets\.(avatarImage|characterImage|battleBackground|iconImage)\(' "$f" | grep -oP '(\w+)\s*=' | sed 's/\s*=//' || true); for VAR in $VARS; do if grep -q "Image\.asset($VAR[^!]" "$f" 2>/dev/null; then LINE=$(grep -n "Image\.asset($VAR[^!]" "$f" || true); [ -n "$LINE" ] && ISSUES="${ISSUES}[WARN] Nullable var $VAR in Image.asset — ${f}: ${LINE} | "; fi; done; fi; done <<< "$CHANGED"; if [ -n "$ISSUES" ]; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"Pre-push Flutter check found issues: ${ISSUES}Please fix before pushing.\"}}"; else echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"Pre-push Flutter check: no nullable/import issues in changed .dart files."}}'; fi

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if ! echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^git\s+push'; then exit 0; fi; RESULT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_response // ""'); echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"Git push completed. Remember to check CI status at https://github.com/jambocoder159/PT_game_trible/actions for build errors.\"}}"
